# BuildBundle.Attributes.Entitlements

**Object**

Entitlement information for your app or App Clip.

## Declaration

```swift
object BuildBundle.Attributes.Entitlements
```

## Objects

- **BuildBundle.Attributes.Entitlements.Any Key**: A string that represents the path to an executable in the build bundle.
